description: basic filter with contains on text_value_22
sql:
select `o`.`sequential_id`, `o`.`label`
from `obj_new` `o`
where `o`.`workspace_id` = '3264257b-7e21-44e2-ada3-fd1117ede598' and (`o`.`obj_type_id` in (unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')), unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-',''))) and (`o`.`obj_type_id` = unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-','')) or `o`.`obj_type_id` = unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-',''))) and (`o`.`text_value_23` = 'KitchenAid' and `o`.`obj_type_id` in (unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')), unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-',''))) and (match(`o`.`text_value_22`) against('\"Requirements\"' in boolean mode) and `o`.`text_value_22` != '\U0010ffff' and `o`.`obj_type_id` in (unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')), unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-','')))) and (`o`.`text_value_9` = 'Electrolux' and `o`.`obj_type_id` in (unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')), unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-','')))) and (`o`.`numeric_value_3` = 22 and `o`.`obj_type_id` in (unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')), unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-',''))) or `o`.`numeric_value_1` = 720 and `o`.`obj_type_id` in (unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')), unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-',''))))))
order by `o`.`label` asc
limit 1000
offset 0;

select `o`.`sequential_id`, `o`.`label`
from `obj_new` `o`
where `o`.`workspace_id` = '3264257b-7e21-44e2-ada3-fd1117ede598'
  and (`o`.`obj_type_id` in (unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')), unhex(replace('4bc0e97a-1789-433d-8969-7fdd61d4c5b5','-','')), unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-','')), unhex(replace('bcf3698a-4175-42a9-8666-43d1bc8ecd15','-','')), unhex(replace('cab76eba-265a-411c-8201-54d4ed4cf555','-','')))
       and (match(`o`.`text_value_1`) against('"admiral-1000048"' in boolean mode)
            and `o`.`text_value_1` != '\U0010ffff'))
order by `o`.`label` asc
limit 1000
offset 0;

description: cross-column contains on text_value_4 or text_value_5
sql:
(
select `o`.`sequential_id`, `o`.`label`
from `obj_new` `o`
where `o`.`workspace_id` = '3264257b-7e21-44e2-ada3-fd1117ede598'
  and `o`.`obj_type_id` in (unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')), unhex(replace('4bc0e97a-1789-433d-8969-7fdd61d4c5b5','-','')), unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-','')), unhex(replace('bcf3698a-4175-42a9-8666-43d1bc8ecd15','-','')), unhex(replace('cab76eba-265a-411c-8201-54d4ed4cf555','-','')))

)
union distinct
(
select `o`.`sequential_id`, `o`.`label`
from `obj_new` `o`
where `o`.`workspace_id` = '3264257b-7e21-44e2-ada3-fd1117ede598'
  and `o`.`obj_type_id` in (unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')), unhex(replace('4bc0e97a-1789-433d-8969-7fdd61d4c5b5','-','')), unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-','')), unhex(replace('bcf3698a-4175-42a9-8666-43d1bc8ecd15','-','')), unhex(replace('cab76eba-265a-411c-8201-54d4ed4cf555','-','')))
  and `o`.`text_value_5` != '\U0010ffff'
  and match(`o`.`text_value_5`) against('"www.shelby-torp.info"' in boolean mode)
)

limit 1000
offset 0;

description: relationship traversal with text_value_1 contains candidates
sql:
select `o`.`sequential_id`, `o`.`label`
from `obj_new` `o`
inner join (
  (
    select `i`.`id`
    from `obj_new` `i`
    where `i`.`workspace_id` = '3264257b-7e21-44e2-ada3-fd1117ede598'
      and `i`.`obj_type_id` in (
        unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')),
        unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-','')),
        unhex(replace('cab76eba-265a-411c-8201-54d4ed4cf555','-',''))
      )
      and `i`.`numeric_value_3` > 22
      and `i`.`text_value_1` != '\U0010ffff'
      and match(`i`.`text_value_1`) against('"admiral-1000178"' in boolean mode)
  )
  union distinct
  (
    select `i`.`id`
    from `obj_new` `i`
    where `i`.`workspace_id` = '3264257b-7e21-44e2-ada3-fd1117ede598'
      and `i`.`obj_type_id` in (
        unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')),
        unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-','')),
        unhex(replace('cab76eba-265a-411c-8201-54d4ed4cf555','-',''))
      )
      and `i`.`numeric_value_3` > 22
      and `i`.`text_value_1` != '\U0010ffff'
      and match(`i`.`text_value_1`) against('"admiral-100009"' in boolean mode)
  )
) `ft`
  on `ft`.`id` = `o`.`id`
where `o`.`workspace_id` = '3264257b-7e21-44e2-ada3-fd1117ede598'
  and `o`.`obj_type_id` in (
    unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')),
    unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-','')),
    unhex(replace('cab76eba-265a-411c-8201-54d4ed4cf555','-',''))
  )
  and exists (
    select 1
    from `obj_relationship_new` `subR`
    inner join `obj_new` `subO1`
      on `subR`.`referenced_object_id` = `subO1`.`id`
     and `subO1`.`obj_type_id` in (
       unhex(replace('224a0035-8ac2-4e01-b892-fa4c7a268523','-','')),
       unhex(replace('2c0cb0be-dda3-4f33-8979-441e073a3873','-','')),
       unhex(replace('3fe7df63-f9c1-4581-be1b-cd649fdbb6ce','-','')),
       unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')),
       unhex(replace('4bc0e97a-1789-433d-8969-7fdd61d4c5b5','-','')),
       unhex(replace('571d993b-45b0-47e3-b9d0-0e65f44e853f','-','')),
       unhex(replace('94c23b0c-1362-4e30-b392-9dc80eb80b27','-','')),
       unhex(replace('bcf3698a-4175-42a9-8666-43d1bc8ecd15','-','')),
       unhex(replace('cab76eba-265a-411c-8201-54d4ed4cf555','-',''))
     )
    where `o`.`id` = `subR`.`object_id`
      and `subO1`.`workspace_id` = '3264257b-7e21-44e2-ada3-fd1117ede598'
  )
order by `o`.`label` asc
limit 1000
offset 0;

description: json query with contains on text_value_20
sql:
select `o`.`sequential_id`, `o`.`label`
from `obj_new` `o`
where `o`.`workspace_id` = '3264257b-7e21-44e2-ada3-fd1117ede598' and (`o`.`obj_type_id` = unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-','')) and (`o`.`numeric_value_3` > 0 and `o`.`obj_type_id` = unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-',''))) and (lower(`o`.`text_value_7`) = 'siemens' and left(`o`.`text_value_7`, 1) != '⁣' and `o`.`obj_type_id` = unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-',''))) and (match(`o`.`text_value_20`) against('\"⁣4⁣\"' in boolean mode) and `o`.`text_value_20` != '􏿿' and `o`.`obj_type_id` = unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-',''))) and (JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(`o`.`other_values_indexed`, CONCAT('$."', '7551dfe3-f09a-4551-ad6c-59478ed5388a', '"'))) > 0 and `o`.`obj_type_id` = unhex(replace('4812f881-af30-4227-afb7-107aedb7f40c','-',''))))
order by `o`.`label` asc
limit 1000
offset 0;
